title: cs-vm cycle collector: route region pointers via decode_gc_handle
description: In CycleVisit for Bindings (cs-vm/src/vm.rs ~11162), every pointer tag is reconstituted via cs_gc::Gc::from_raw_jit (the Rc path), including region-allocated values. The arm64-Linux nanbox 48-bit fix (PR #124, commit 2ccf9ed) made the decoded pointer correct (shift-decompress + region-flag strip via nb_decode_gc_ptr), but region pointers still take the Rc from_raw_jit path rather than from_raw_jit_region / decode_gc_handle as to_value does. ManuallyDrop avoids refcount churn so reads are fine, but it is inconsistent with to_value and a latent hazard if region values reach cycle collection. Investigate whether region values can reach the cycle visitor; if so, route via decode_gc_handle(ptr, is_region) and add a region-in-cycle test; if not, document why it is safe.
acceptance_criteria: Either: region values route through decode_gc_handle with a regression test; or a comment documents that region values cannot reach CycleVisit.
